title: ocimastrum × intermedium
intro: Ocimastrum × intermedium, a hybrid plant, is a cross between Ocimum basilicum (sweet basil) and Ocimum minimum (basil). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ocimastrum × intermedium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Ocimastrum × intermedium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in cooking and as a flavoring agent in various recipes.
